name: Diabetic Cottage Cheese Vegetable Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 (8 ounce) package noodles - cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
Yield 12 servings - 1/2 C ea. Each serving may be exchanged for: 1 Bread, 1 Low-Fat Meat
Parsley sprigs (optional)
Combine carrots, onion and margarine in a non-stick skillet; cook on medium heat until tender. Add mushrooms and cook for an additional 5 minutes. Set aside.
Combine remaining ingredients, except parsley, in a large bowl; stir in cooked vegetables. Pour mixture into a non-stick 2-quart casserole dish. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until bubbly. Garnish with parsley before serving, if desired.
